'''yazasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whataboutist|whataboutist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-z-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whataboutist|whataboutist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yazasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæzæshæth|yæzæshæth]] || [[word:yæzæshæj|yæzæshæj]] || [[word:yæzæshæsh|yæzæshæsh]] || [[word:yæzæshæ|yæzæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazazashath|yazazashath]] || [[word:yazazashaj|yazazashaj]] || [[word:yazazashash|yazazashash]] || [[word:yazazasha|yazazasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazashath|yazashath]] || [[word:yazashaj|yazashaj]] || [[word:yazashash|yazashash]] || [[word:yazasha|yazasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazafshath|yazafshath]] || [[word:yazafshaj|yazafshaj]] || [[word:yazafshash|yazafshash]] || [[word:yazafshaf|yazafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yazashatha|yazashatha]] || [[word:yazashaja|yazashaja]] || [[word:yazashasha|yazashasha]] || [[word:yazashaka|yazashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yazashath|yazashath]] || [[word:yazashaj|yazashaj]] || [[word:yazashash|yazashash]] || [[word:yazasha|yazasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yazashathal|yazashathal]] || [[word:yazashajal|yazashajal]] || [[word:yazashashal|yazashashal]] || [[word:yazashakal|yazashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yazashathatha|yazashathatha]] || [[word:yazashajaja|yazashajaja]] || [[word:yazashashasha|yazashashasha]] || [[word:yazashaka|yazashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yazashathan|yazashathan]] || [[word:yazashajan|yazashajan]] || [[word:yazashashan|yazashashan]] || [[word:yazashakan|yazashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yazashathaoro|yazashathaoro]] || [[word:yazashajaoro|yazashajaoro]] || [[word:yazashashaoro|yazashashaoro]] || [[word:yazashakaoro|yazashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
